title: Spotlight highlights - discussing peer-review
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"chp9h","text":"This protocol offers snipets of interviews with PLOS ONE Lab Protocol authors discussing the motivations to peer-review their protocols, the significance of the peer-reviewer feedback they got, and the implications that these articles have had for their careers.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":48,"length":21}],"data":{}},{"key":"1tp7j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1m9oo","text":"For the full interviews, visit the protocols.io Spotlight Youtube Channel, and to read the protocols visit he Spotlight Workspace.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":35,"length":12},{"key":2,"offset":48,"length":25},{"key":3,"offset":110,"length":19}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"45A73C30BE1211EDB19ED936368ECC1B","url":"https://journals.plos.org/plosone/s/what-we-publish/#loc-lab-protocols"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"DFFAD580BE1211EDB19ED936368ECC1B","url":"https://www.protocols.io/welcome"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"CFD8E3E0BE1211EDB19ED936368ECC1B","url":"https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLf6EA-a90R7YTcUqw_mS2nKi44jOsXOKM"}},"3":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9A484630BE1211EDB19ED936368ECC1B","url":"https://www.protocols.io/workspaces/spotlight-series/publications"}}}}
